user.title: Choose connection type
user.description: Choose whether Home Assistant talks to the ET312 directly over serial or through an MQTT bridge.

serial.title: Connect to ET312 over serial
serial.description: Enter the serial connection details for your ET312 device.

mqtt.title: Connect to ET312 over MQTT
mqtt.description: Enter the MQTT topics used by your ET312 bridge. Home Assistant's MQTT integration must already be configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the ET312 device

abort.already_configured: This ET312 device is already configured
